body_txt: Something a condemned person requests right before they die. The opportunity may be offered to you by the executioner on Death Row out of personal kindness or cultural tradition . Common requests include: A character can also transfer their responsibilities to someone else with their last breath. A condemned person asking someone to take care of their own family , deliver a message , avenge them , or generally keep up the good fight is almost playing low though, as a deathbed promise, even by request, is very hard to refuse and nearly unbreakable — even if no one would ever know . (Though if one is Dying as Yourself , you may have no choice.) It can even be done with one's enemies if they accept a Dying Truce . This can be made especially touching with added Pietà Plagiarism , or even Cradling Your Kill . If someone is dying very slowly, as of cancer, one can, in fact, make it a period before death; for instance, at the last visit to the hospital, even if death occurs a week later. Requests made by ghosts and other undead qualify only if undeath is ending quickly. Occasionally a character will pretend to be at death's door, in order to get someone to agree to something; most often played for comedy. Related to Bucket List , when a person whose days are numbered chooses some life experiences they’ve always wanted try before they kick it.
